name: Peanut Butter Cream Cheese Pies
recipeIngredient: 2 graham cracker crust pie shells (9-inch, baked)
1 package instant chocolate pudding (prepared as directed on box)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together the peanut butter, cream cheese, and margarine with an electric mixer until blended.
2. Gradually add 1/4 cup sugar to the mixture. Beat for about 1 minute, or until soft and fluffy.
3. Add vanilla extract and mix until well combined.
4. In a separate bowl, whip the cream with 1 tablespoon of sugar until soft peaks form when the beaters are lifted.
5. Gently fold the whipped cream into the peanut butter mixture until thoroughly blended.
6. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pie shells.
7. Frost the pies with a layer of chocolate pudding, about half an inch thick.
8. Sprinkle chopped peanuts over the top of each pie.
9. Cover the pies loosely with plastic wrap or inverted pie crust covers.
10. Chill in the refrigerator for at least two hours before serving.
